title: LearnPyByAI JWT Claims Schema
description: JWT claims schema for Kong API Gateway validation and downstream service authorization

role.description: User role for role-based access control

iat.description: Issued At - Unix timestamp when token was issued

exp.description: Expiration Time - Unix timestamp when token expires (15 minutes after iat)

notes.refresh_mechanism: Use refresh token to obtain new access token

kong_integration.description: Kong JWT plugin validates signature using public key from /api/auth/public-key endpoint
validation_steps: 1. Kong validates JWT signature using RS256 public key
2. Kong checks exp claim (token not expired)
3. Kong checks iat claim (token not issued in future)
4. Kong extracts claims and passes as headers to backend services

security_considerations: Access tokens are short-lived (15 minutes) to limit exposure window
Refresh tokens are long-lived (7 days) but stored as hashes in database
Token rotation on refresh prevents replay attacks
RS256 enables distributed validation without sharing signing secret
Kong validates tokens at gateway layer before reaching backend services

teacher: Access student data for assigned classes only
